feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: AFC- Standard Closing Comprehensive list for Manufacturing industry
entry.content:
Our client is interested in understanding the best practices for AFC in the manufacturing industry and identifying key tasks to consider while re-engineering their ECC-based Excel tasks for migration to AFC-S/4HANA Cloud. While SAP provides standard tasks, our primary focus is on obtaining a comprehensive list of manufacturing-specific tasks to establish a new AFC template.

Any pointers /guidance will be helpful

entry.title: Please help me to understand the integration process required for Material Ledger in a 2-Tier system
entry.content:
Dear Team

Please help me to understand the integration process required for Material Ledger in a 2-Tier system

2 Tier system, One with SAP S/4 HANA Public cloud and another with S/4 HANA Private cloud.

  1. How does the Material Ledger manage intercompany transactions and transfer pricing in a 2-tier system?
  2. What are the challenges and solutions for synchronizing Material Ledger data between the Private Cloud and Public Cloud in a 2-tier system?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Using DRF with embedded TM and decentralized EWM
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

is it possible to use DRF for BP in a Scenario with an S4/HANA ERP with embedded TM and a decentralized EWM System?

Or is there something here that speaks against it?

 

Thanks!

entry.title: How to extend application log expiry date
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I would like to confirm how we can extend application log expiry date in S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition.

We have tried to create the below variant that should delete logs after one year in DEV system but we do not know how we can apply the changes to QAS or PRD (since this cannot be transported).

Variant in SLG2

Could you help us with confirming the way to apply the change to QAS/PRD and check if the logs are not deleted as we expect?

Thank you in advance.

Fujita

entry.title: Limitation when defining automatic compensation criteria
entry.content:
Hi Team,

A customer has asked to confirm a limitation when defining automatic compensation criteria. We checked and it seems that Functional Area cannot be added as automatic clearing criterion (transaction OB74). Could anyone confirm this limitation or provide some feedback?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: PGR not happening while doing the sale return
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

I am doing MTO Process in ECC System.I have done PGI/Billing, Now i am creating Return w.r.t to the Billing i have created the Return Sales Orders but while doing PGR It is showing me one error, attaching the screenshot as well.

Kindly look upon it and help me in this. I have seen various post posted in community but it not solve by issue

Pardeep

entry.title: Program to modify for avoid planned GI date update in Transportation Planning with TM
entry.content:
Hello

 

Please which program do i update to change the behavior of planned GI date update in SAP S/4HANA. Because I use this date for pricing at the order level and do not want it to be updated. How can I change this?

entry.title: S/4HANA 2023 Route schedule not considered with BPS
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

I was using route schedule in SD/LE in order to schedule departure from shipping point on regular days of the week (exemple : to move from Lyon to Berlin, I have a departure each week on wednesday)

Since i'm using S/4HANA 2023 FPS01, I'm trying to use Business Process Scheduling in order to have the nice result screen of scheduling.

But as soon as I activate BPS, the route schedule is not considered anymore.

It seems that this feature is going to be deprecated as per SAP Note 3261640 - Usage of LE-TRA Route and discontinuation of Transportation features of LE-TRA in public cloud

But I did not find a suitable way to manage the equivalent of route schedule (one departure per week, on wednesday for example) using BPS.

How do you recommand to achieve this ?

Thanks a lot for your help.

Regards,

Cédric

entry.title: SES Creator Assignment and Notification Based on PO Creation Scenario
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have received a requirement from the customer to control the SES (Service Entry Sheet) creator and send notifications based on how the PO (Purchase Order) is created. The key point is that this should be achieved entirely through MM configuration, with minimum ABAP developments. However, if there is no standard way to achieve this, I would appreciate suggestions on possible workarounds.

Here are the requirements:

  1. PO Created with Reference to PR (Purchase Requisition)

    • The PR creator should be nominated as the SES creator.
    • The PR creator should receive a notification when the PO is created.
    • Another notification should be sent when the delivery date is reached.
    • Only the PR creator should be allowed to create the SES.

  2. PO Created Without PR

    • A field should be available to nominate the SES creator.
    • The recipient field, for example, should have a search help (F4) with a list of users.
    • The entered name in the recipient field should be assigned as the SES creator.
    • The SES creator should receive notifications when the PO is created and when the delivery date is reached.

  3. PO Created Without PR and Without Recipient Name

    • The system should allow any user with the appropriate role to create the SES.

  4. PO Created with PR and Recipient Name

    • Both the PR creator and the recipient should be allowed to create the SES.

Looking forward to your insights. Thanks in advance!

entry.title: WCF Fiori Apps Layout Configuration (Cannot use a configuration key other than <DEFAULT>)
entry.content:
Hello, everyone!

I come from a SAP CRM background in which, whenever we needed to customize the WebUI, it was considered a best practice to create a role configuration key, assign it to a business role and copy the <DEFAULT> configuration in order to always have the original reference:

We are now using S/4HANA Service on the private cloud and the decided approach was to launch everything from the Fiori Launchpad. However, I am not able to force the app to use the configuration I created with a custom configuration key.

If I launch the old webclient (via tcode CRM_UI) and select the correct business role, it calls my configuration perfectly. If I launch the service order app (TBT116MSR, a WCF launched via Fiori) it always calls the <DEFAULT> configuration key.

Looking at the help page, i found this link that mentions the following:

So, if we are using the Service Orders app from the Fiori Launchpad as a single point of entry, does that mean that from now on we should customize the layout (standard and custom fields, standard and custom assignment blocks, etc) on the standard configuration using the <DEFAULT> config key?

Thanks in advance for any inputs,

Arthur

entry.title: How to post GR for a consumable material without PO and directly consume it in MIGO?
entry.content:
I need to post a GR for a consumable material in MIGO without a PO. The material should not be stored in inventory but should be directly consumed (expensed to a cost center or another account assignment object).

I understand that movement type 201 is for issuing from stock, but in this case, the material is not in stock. 501 allows GR without PO, but it does not directly consume the material.

Is there a standard movement type for this process in SAP?

If not, can you guide me on how to create a custom movement type to handle this scenario?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: How to Trigger InvoiceRequest_Out
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I would like to understand how to trigger the standard SOAP (Proxy) service InvoiceRequest_Out in S/4HANA.

Service Reference: Customer Invoice - Send (B2B) - Customer Invoice - Send (B2B) | SAP Help Portal

Do I need to build a custom program to feed the data and call the proxy, or is there a standard way to trigger this service, similar to how we configure IDocs through Output Types?

I couldn’t find clear documentation on this.

I've already created the logical port in SOAMANAGER and set it as default, but that alone doesn’t trigger the message.

We are on S/4HANA Private Cloud - 2023 version.

Thanks,

Anuradha

entry.title: ILM Certified store -latest link
entry.content:
Hi All,

Can you please provide latest list of ILM certified (BC-ILM) or Archivelink(BC-AL) third party storage -

Old link:

https://www.sap.com/dmc/exp/2013_09_adpd/enEN/#/solutions?search=ILM

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

Jinal

entry.title: financial statement version not updated from changes in global hierarchies
entry.content:
We have financial statement versions that were miograted to global hierarchies. Since then, all changes have been applied in global hierarchies. Some users continue with sap gui and the old version of the financial statements.

The problem is that all changes applied to global hierarchies are not replicated in the financial statement version. That means reporting financial statement versions in sapgui becomes obsolete. Is there a way to update the FSV hierarchy?

thank you!!

entry.title: Condition contract management conditions RES1 vs REA1
entry.content:
Hello,

When reading about the difference between RES1 and REA1, I read that:

"Condition type RES1 Rebate:

You use this condition type RES1 in a condition contract to maintain rebate conditions in the sales rebate scenarios

Condition type REA1 Rebate Accruals:

You use this condition type REA1 in a condition contract to maintain accruals conditions in the sales rebate scenarios."

What is the difference between rebate and accruals?

Is the rebate referring maybe to the time before CCM and it is the same as discounts being part of the sales order pricing procedure or something else, but in CCM maybe not visible there anymore or how is it?

Thank you!

entry.title: Condition contract management overwrite the accrual amounts with a fixed sum
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible when using CCM to manually overwrite or enter a sum/amount to be credited to the customer, could be at any of partial, delta or final settlement phase, with a fixed amount, if there were accruals applied?

Thank you!

entry.title: SAP RISE DMO Migration - Storage Migration Server
entry.content:
Hi all,

 

I'm not quite clear about the storage on the migration server and whether we need additional storage there. In the presentation, the storage details for the HANA directories (/hana/shared; /hana/data and /hana/log) are missing. How much memory is available to us there?

And if we realize during the first migration that we need more memory, how quickly could it be made available to us?

entry.title: How to start a career as a SAP Functional Consultant?
entry.content:
Hello fellow SAP community.

I just finished my master's degree in business and product management. During my studies, I found a keen interest in SAP, specially in S/4HANA.

Because of this, I am aspiring on becoming a functional consultant. To do so, I currently find myself doing the learning journey " Explore Integrated Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA", plus an institutional overview course on SAP S/4HANA. My goal is to take the SAP Certified Associate - Business Process Integration with SAP S/4HANA.

Does this certificate covers the requirements to start a career as a functional business processes consultant in SAP S/4HANA? What else should I consider to start my career as a SAP S/4HANA consultant?

I appreciate in advance the support and guidance you may provide.

Best regards,

Erick Dos Santos.

entry.title: How to connect to GCP Storage Bucket provided with Handover files to transfer Backup to SAP Rise
entry.content:
How to connect to GCP Storage Bucket provided by SAP with Handover files to transfer Backup to SAP Rise

The purpose of this blog is to demonstrate how to connect to the GCP Bucket with the credentials provided by SAP via sharepoint through the files Handover "<sid><prefix-customer>_BROWNFIELD_CREDENTIALS.docx".

In this demonstration we will use an operating system SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 15 SP5.

 

Example of a file "<sid><prefix-customer>_BROWNFIELD_CREDENTIALS.docx".

 

Creating the .JSON file

Start by creating a .JSON file with the information contained in the file  "_BROWNFIELD_CREDENTIALS.docx"

Copy the contents of the "JSON File Details" contained within the characters { }.

Example:

Paste into a notepad and save with the extension .json

Example:

 

Create a directory on the operating system from where you will transfer the backup and save the generated .json file. You can use the same directory for the next download and installation activities of the gsutil tool that will use this .json.

 

Installing of GSUTIL

Use this official documentation: https://cloud.google.com/storage/docs/gsutil_install?hl=pt-br#linux

Switch to the folder you created in the previous step with the command "cd".

Download: 

curl -O https://dl.google.com/dl/cloudsdk/channels/rapid/downloads/google-cloud-cli-linux-x86_64.tar.gz

Extract:

tar -xf google-cloud-cli-linux-x86_64.tar.gz

Installing:

./google-cloud-sdk/install.sh

You can use the default options during installation, in my case it was like this:

Log out and start a new session for the changes to take effect.

 

Register with the account contained in the .json

Use the command below changing it to the path of your .json file, you will have a result similar to the image.

gcloud auth activate-service-account --key-file=/gsutil/gcp-key1.json

 

Validate access to GCP Storage Bucket

Use the ls command to list the directories on your account.

Examples:

gsutil ls gs://sahecXXXtransferXXX01/

After the first copy just adjust the path to list sub directories

gsutil ls gs://sahecXXXtransferXXX01/HD4-21032025

 

In my case, I did not identify the account name, I had to ask the Project Lead because this information was not included in the brownfield file.

The list of bucket names should be returned with the command

gcloud storage ls --project=my-project

In the example below, I am listing the remote directory with a backup copy that I made.

Next, I will pass the command to execute a copy.

 

Copying your backup to GCP Bucket Storage

Run the command "gsutil -m cp -r SOURCE gs://TARGET/"

Example:

gsutil -m cp -r SOURCE-FOLDER-OF-YOUR-BACKUP gs://saheXXXtransferXX01/

After the copy is complete, you can list the files again with the command:

gsutil ls gs://sahecXXXtransferXXX01/HD4-21032025/

The -m parameter is used to copy files in parallel,
more details about advanced parameters can be found at this official link: https://cloud.google.com/sdk/gcloud/reference/storage/cp

In the example above, the 237GB copy took 2 hours, the speed will depend on the upload speed of your internet connection.

In the same example, I performed a HANA backup with a 20GB Split. This helps in case of a very large file failure so that you don't have to reprocess everything from the beginning.

 

 

After finishing, you just need to request a copy of the GCP Bucket backup to the /Migration directory, which is probably mounted on your Skeleton system database server. To do this, open the Service Request with the "Download Data from Cloud to Block Storage" template, providing details of the source and destination such as SID, hostname, IP, source and destination path.

entry.title: Is there a scope item which support the Intracompany STO process in S4 Hana Private Cloud?
entry.content:
We require the Intracompany Stock Transfer with delivery process for S4 Private Cloud, at the moment we haven´t found any scope item with this functionality.

For Public Cloud the scope item "BME - Intracompany STO with delivery process" supports this functionality, but it is not enabled for private.

 Is there any scope item which support the "Intracompany STO with delivery process" in S4 Hana Private Cloud?,
